name: The Water Tower and Rail Yard
description: The iron water tower stands at the north end of the yard, its shadow falling across the consist of parked cars on the siding — the space between the cars creates a maze of dark corridors that anyone who knows the yard can use as cover.
atmosphericDetails: The water tower drips steadily — the sound masks footsteps at close range.
The consist on the siding includes a tender still warm from the evening run, its coal smell strong.
A lantern is mounted on the waycar at the end of the consist — its light barely reaches the water tower but makes the middle ground visible.
